member.name: M:DisplayPad.SDK.DisplayPadHelper.#ctor
member.summary: constructor of DisplayPadHelper class.

member.name: M:DisplayPad.SDK.DisplayPadHelper.PlugCallback(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Raised when device status is changed like plug/unplug
member.param: Notification signal when device is inserted / removed
0 for REMOVE, i for PLUG, 2 for SUSPEND
the device ID

member.name: M:DisplayPad.SDK.DisplayPadHelper.ProgressCallback(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.param: Notification signal when device's FW is updating
target device's ID
if WParam == -1, Failed to update FW, if WParam is 0~ 100, it is progress.

member.name: M:DisplayPad.SDK.DisplayPadHelper.KeyCallback(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns key press status
member.param: Key matrix id. See the matrix table
key is pressed or released. 1 for pressed and 0 for released.
control the target, the vaule is not zero

member.name: M:DisplayPad.SDK.DisplayPadHelper.DisplayPadDllVersion
member.summary: Returns the dll version

member.name: M:DisplayPad.SDK.DisplayPadHelper.DisplayPadGetDeviceInfo(System.Int32)
member.summary: Get "DevInfo"，Get version-related information

member.name: M:DisplayPad.SDK.DisplayPadHelper.DisplayPadIsDevicePlug(System.Int32)
member.summary: Device plug status

member.name: M:DisplayPad.SDK.DisplayPadHelper.DisplayPadOpenUSBDriver(System.String)
member.summary: Initial the device and detect the plug/ unplug
member.param: the handle for notification
member.returns: bool: true plugged in，false not plugged in

member.name: M:DisplayPad.SDK.DisplayPadHelper.DisplayPadCloseUSBDriver
member.summary: Close the device's control

member.name: M:DisplayPad.SDK.DisplayPadHelper.DisplayPadIsUpdating(System.Int32)
member.summary: Confirm whether the firmware is being updated.
member.param: control the target, the vaule is not zero
member.returns: true is updated, false is not updated

member.name: M:DisplayPad.SDK.DisplayPadHelper.DisplayPadStartFWUpdate(DisplayPad.SDK.DisplayPadSDK.FWBinUpdateInfo_byte,System.Int32)
member.summary: Start FW update (open update thread)
member.param: control the target, the vaule is not zero
member.returns: true is Success，false is Fail or wrong BIN File.

member.name: M:DisplayPad.SDK.DisplayPadHelper.DisplayPadCalculateBMP(System.Int32)
member.summary: Get the number of BMP spaces remaining in the FW Note : call SetIconPic(UploadImage) to save image. If it is used, the fucntion will return the remaining valule.
member.param: control the target, the vaule is not zero

member.name: M:DisplayPad.SDK.DisplayPadHelper.DisplayPadResetPicture(System.Int32)
member.summary: Reset the all buttons's pictures of the current profile.
member.param: control the target, the vaule is not zero

member.name: M:DisplayPad.SDK.DisplayPadHelper.DisplayPadEraseSectorMem(System.String,System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Clear the specified sector's data( Clear to 0xFF)
member.param: The Start Index
The End Index
control the target, the vaule is not zero

member.summary: Switch the current profile and current effect.
member.param: switch to the target profile
control the target, the vaule is not zero

member.summary: Get FW version number
member.param: control the target, the vaule is not zero

member.name: M:DisplayPad.SDK.DisplayPadHelper.DisplayPadGetFWInfo(System.Int32)
member.summary: Get FWInfo Struct data
member.param: control the target, the vaule is not zero

member.name: M:DisplayPad.SDK.DisplayPadHelper.DisplayPadAPEnable(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Enable/Disale the SW's control.
member.param: If true, all are controlled by SW, otherwise some functions are con controlled by FW
control the target, the vaule is not zero

member.name: M:DisplayPad.SDK.DisplayPadHelper.DisplayPadSetTFTSleepTime(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Set the time for TFT-LCD to go to sleep
member.param: Sleep function switch. 0 is Off. 1 is On.
hour: 0~24
control the target, the vaule is not zero

member.name: M:DisplayPad.SDK.DisplayPadHelper.DisplayPadSetMainBrightness(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Switch the Led's Brightness

member.summary: Enable/Disable the custom keys function for keyboard
member.param: if true, the function is ON, else the function is Off.
control the target, the vaule is not zero

member.name: M:DisplayPad.SDK.DisplayPadHelper.DisplayPadResetFlash(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Reset the profiles in Flash.
member.param: if 0, reset the current profile, else reset the all profiles.
control the target, the vaule is not zero

member.name: M:DisplayPad.SDK.DisplayPadHelper.DisplayPadResetKeys(System.Int32)
member.summary: Restore the key Assignment to default values.
member.param: control the target, the vaule is not zero

member.name: M:DisplayPad.SDK.DisplayPadHelper.DisplayPadChangeKey(System.String,System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Change the key to other custom functions.
member.param: source keys
key function
control the target, the vaule is not zero

member.name: M:DisplayPad.SDK.DisplayPadHelper.DisplayPadChangeShortcutKey(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Change the key to other custom functions.
member.param: source keys
Standard key function (0x01~0xFE see.Key Table)
Enable is 1 bit[0] = Ctrl bit[1] = Shift bit[2] = Alt bit[3] = GUI(Win)
control the target, the vaule is not zero

member.summary: Change the key to the launch functions.

control the target, the vaule is not zero

member.summary: Change the key to the launch functions.
member.param: >Struct of MacroInputContent
control the target, the vaule is not zero

member.summary: Read the settings of the macro key.
member.param: source Profile
source keys
control the target, the vaule is not zero

member.name: M:DisplayPad.SDK.DisplayPadHelper.DisplayPadSetSyncAcrossProfiles(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Set SyncAcross Profile's Status

member.name: M:DisplayPad.SDK.DisplayPadHelper.DisplayPadCheckBMPStorage(System.Int32)
member.summary: Get the number of BMP spaces remaining in the FW
member.param: control the target, the vaule is not zero
member.returns: Returns the count of repaired BMPs

member.name: M:DisplayPad.SDK.DisplayPadHelper.DisplayPadGetBtnBMPLength(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Get the count of BMP used by target's button in the target's profile in the FW
member.param: The target's profile
The target's button
control the target, the vaule is not zero
member.returns: Return the count of BMP used by button..

member.summary: Get the Led's Brightness

member.name: M:DisplayPad.SDK.DisplayPadHelper.UploadImage(System.Int32,System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: This method use to upload non animated image
member.param: Device ID
image path
button index

member.name: M:DisplayPad.SDK.DisplayPadHelper.DrawBitmapWithBorder(System.Drawing.Bitmap)
member.summary: this method use to reduced the button image and added border on it.
member.param: image

member.name: M:DisplayPad.SDK.DisplayPadHelper.UploadImageBySetIconPic(System.Int32,System.String,System.Int32,System.Boolean,System.Int32)
member.summary: This method use to upload non animated image by SetIconPic
member.param: Device ID
image path
button index
APEnable state
Profile Index

member.name: P:DisplayPad.SDK.Helper.Logger.LogPath
member.summary: Folder path to save log files. (If not passed then will save files inside application folder)

member.name: M:DisplayPad.SDK.Helper.Logger.LogError(System.Exception,System.String)
member.summary: Write exception details in log file
member.param: exception to log

member.name: M:DisplayPad.SDK.Helper.Logger.LogMessage(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Write any text in log file
member.param: message text to log

member.name: M:DisplayPad.SDK.Helper.Logger.DeleteOldLogs(System.String)
member.summary: Deletes the old files

member.name: F:DisplayPad.SDK.DisplayPadSDK.lstDeviceID
member.summary: contains connected device ids

member.name: M:DisplayPad.SDK.DisplayPadSDK.GetDLLVersion
member.summary: Get SDK Dll's Version

members.member:
Initial the device and detect the plug/ unplug
the handle for notification true plugged in，false not plugged in When the device is inserted, removed or suspended, the SDK will send WM_DEVICE_PLUG to the hNotifyhWnd. Please process suspend job within 3 seconds, when you receive the suspended notification.

member.name: M:DisplayPad.SDK.DisplayPadSDK.CloseUSBDriver
member.summary: Close the device's control

member.name: M:DisplayPad.SDK.DisplayPadSDK.GetDevCount(System.Int32@)
member.summary: Get the count of inserted DKDs.
member.param: return the count.
member.returns: true is success, false is fail

member.name: M:DisplayPad.SDK.DisplayPadSDK.IsUpdating(System.UInt32)
member.summary: Confirm whether the firmware is being updated.
member.param: control the target, the vaule is not zero
member.returns: true is updated, false is not updated

members.member:
Start FW update (open update thread)
control the target, the vaule is not zero
Use hNotifyhWnd of “OpenUSBDriver” to PostMessage “WM_FW_PROGRESS WParam value is the target's ID LPARAM lParam : The percent of progress If percent is -1 : Failed to update FW IF percent value is 100 : Success to update FW

member.name: M:DisplayPad.SDK.DisplayPadSDK.ResetDevice(System.UInt32)
member.summary: Reboot the FW
member.param: control the target, the vaule is not zero

member.name: M:DisplayPad.SDK.DisplayPadSDK.GetDeviceInfo(DisplayPad.SDK.DisplayPadSDK.DevInfo@,System.UInt32)
member.summary: Get version-related information
member.param: return the DeviceInfo
control the target, the vaule is not zero

member.name: M:DisplayPad.SDK.DisplayPadSDK.GetDevAppVer(System.UInt32)
member.summary: Get FW version number
member.param: control the target, the vaule is not zero

member.name: M:DisplayPad.SDK.DisplayPadSDK.IsDevicePlug(System.UInt32)
member.summary: Check if the device is plugged in
member.param: control the target, the vaule is not zero
member.returns: true plugged in，false not plugged in

member.name: M:DisplayPad.SDK.DisplayPadSDK.GetFWInfo(DisplayPad.SDK.DisplayPadSDK.FWInfo@,System.UInt32)
member.summary: Get the FWInfo data
member.param: the struct is saved about the current FW Info
control the target, the vaule is not zero

member.name: M:DisplayPad.SDK.DisplayPadSDK.APEnable(System.Boolean,System.UInt32)
member.summary: Enable/Disale the SW's control
member.param: If true, all are controlled by SW, otherwise some functions are con controlled by FW
control the target, the vaule is not zero

member.name: M:DisplayPad.SDK.DisplayPadSDK.CalculateBMP(System.Byte@,System.UInt32)
member.summary: Get the number of BMP spaces remaining in the FW
member.param: return the number of BMP that can be used.
control the target, the vaule is not zero

member.name: M:DisplayPad.SDK.DisplayPadSDK.SetIconPacket(System.Byte,DisplayPad.SDK.DisplayPadSDK.PicPacketInfo@,System.UInt32)
member.summary: Only Used when apenable is true. Sets the button image to display.
member.param: the index of button.
the data of picture (BGR888 format)
control the target, the vaule is not zero

members.member:
Sets the button image to display.
Tell FW to refresh how to refresh the target image. the data of picture (BGR888 format) the length of data If the value is true, the function will create a new buffer for the pbyData in the function. control the target, the vaule is not zero true Success，false Fail if the BMP amount is not enough in FW, it will return false.

member.name: M:DisplayPad.SDK.DisplayPadSDK.SetTFTSleepTime(System.Byte,System.Byte,System.Byte,System.Byte,System.UInt32)
member.summary: Set the time for TFT-LCD to go to sleep
member.param: Sleep function switch. 0 is Off. 1 is On.
hour, 0~24
control the target, the vaule is not zero

member.name: M:DisplayPad.SDK.DisplayPadSDK.SetMainBrightness(System.Byte,System.UInt32)
member.summary: Switch the Led's Brightness
member.param: control the target, the vaule is not zero

member.name: M:DisplayPad.SDK.DisplayPadSDK.EnableKeyFunc(System.Boolean,System.UInt32)
member.summary: Enable/Disable the custom keys function for keyboard
member.param: if true, the function is ON, else the function is Off.
control the target, the vaule is not zero

member.summary: Set SyncAcross Profile's Status
member.param: 0: Disable, 1:Eanble
control the target, the vaule is not zero

member.name: M:DisplayPad.SDK.DisplayPadSDK.GetSyncAcrossProfiles(System.Boolean@,System.UInt32)
member.summary: Get the SyncAcross Profile's Status
member.param: return value, 0: Disable, 1:Eanble
control the target, the vaule is not zero

member.name: M:DisplayPad.SDK.DisplayPadSDK.ResetFlash(System.Boolean,System.UInt32)
member.summary: Reset the profiles in Flash.
member.param: if 0, reset the current profile, else reset the all profiles.
control the target, the vaule is not zero

member.name: M:DisplayPad.SDK.DisplayPadSDK.ResetBtnPic(System.Byte,System.Byte,System.UInt32)
member.summary: Reset the button of the current profile.
member.param: Target profile.
Target button.
control the target, the vaule is not zero

member.name: M:DisplayPad.SDK.DisplayPadSDK.ResetPicture(System.UInt32)

member.name: M:DisplayPad.SDK.DisplayPadSDK.EraseSectorMem(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.UInt32)
member.summary: Clear the specified sector's data( Clear to 0xFF)
member.param: The Start Index
The End Index
control the target, the vaule is not zero

member.name: M:DisplayPad.SDK.DisplayPadSDK.WriteSectorMem(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.IntPtr,System.UInt32)
member.summary: Write data to the specified sector Note - In most cases, the same address needs to be cleared before repeated writing.
member.param: The sector Index
The address index in the sector
The data length
The pointer of data contents
control the target, the vaule is not zero

member.name: M:DisplayPad.SDK.DisplayPadSDK.ReadSectorMemory(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.IntPtr,System.Int32,System.UInt32)
member.summary: Read data to the specified sector
member.param: The sector Index
The address index in the sector
The data length
pointer to the data contents of the returned data
FW packet transmission speed
control the target, the vaule is not zero

member.name: M:DisplayPad.SDK.DisplayPadSDK.SwitchProfile(System.Int32,System.UInt32)
member.summary: Switch the current profile and current effect.
member.param: switch to the target profile(Profile Index 1~5)
control the target, the vaule is not zero

member.summary: Change the key to other custom functions.
member.param: source keys
key function
control the target, the vaule is not zero

member.summary: Change the key to other custom functions.
member.param: source keys
Standard key function (0x01~0xFE see.Key Table)
Enable is 1 bit [0] = Ctrl bit[1] = Shift bit[2] = Alt bit[3] = GUI(Win)
control the target, the vaule is not zero

member.name: M:DisplayPad.SDK.DisplayPadSDK.SetLaunchContent(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Byte[],System.UInt32)
member.summary: Change the key to the launch functions.
member.param: source keys
data's length
Save the SW information data to FW.
control the target, the vaule is not zero

member.summary: Change the key to the launch functions.
member.param: source keys
data's length
Execution times.
event counts
the contents array of event.
control the target, the vaule is not zero

member.summary: Read the settings of the macro key.

source keys
MacroContent array, return the Macro's Contents

key is pressed or released.

member.summary: When the key of the keyboard is pressed, notify SW.

member.name: M:DisplayPad.SDK.DisplayPadSDK.CheckBMPStorage(System.Byte@,System.UInt32)
member.summary: Get the number of BMP spaces remaining in the FW. Note: When FW is saving bmp and the power is suddenly turned off, an error may occurs in the bmp storage.
member.param: Returns the count of repaired BMPs
control the target, the vaule is not zero

member.summary: Get the count of BMP used by target's button in the target's profile in the FW
member.param: The target's profile
The target's button
Return the count of BMP used by button.
control the target, the vaule is not zero

member.name: M:DisplayPad.SDK.DisplayPadSDK.DisplayLogo(System.Boolean,System.UInt32)
member.summary: Show/Hide the logo
member.param: If true, show the logo. If false, hide the logo
control the target, the vaule is not zero

member.name: M:DisplayPad.SDK.DisplayPadSDK.SetPanelImage(System.UInt32,System.IntPtr,System.UInt32,System.UInt32,System.UInt32,System.UInt32)
member.summary: Sets the image to be displayed in the full screen panel.
member.param: control the target, the vaule is not zero
the data of picture (BGR888 format)
Left border Position
Top border Position
Right border Position
Bottom border Position

member.name: M:DisplayPad.SDK.DisplayPadSDK.SavePanelImage(System.UInt32,System.IntPtr)
member.summary: Save the logo image to be displayed in the full screen panel.
member.param: control the target, the vaule is not zero
the data of picture (BGR888 format), the size is (800 * 400 * 3)
